purpose: Template for autonomous candidate proposal generation.
required_structure: read research memory and learning state before selecting operators
generate proposals from stable candidates, graveyard seeds, or high-value failures
attach cheap_screen result to every proposal before compilation
preferred_patterns: proposal objects remain structured before compiling to workflow configs
operator ordering uses static policy plus learned operator feedback
failure-derived seeds constrain future proposal generation
proposal stage dedupe runs before workflow compilation
discouraged_patterns: raw string expression generation without proposal metadata
repeating the same base-factor pair with too many operators
acceptance_questions: Does the generator consult learning and memory before choosing operators?
Does proposal-stage dedupe suppress obvious repeats?
